name: International Meal Company Alimentacao S.A.
summary: International Meal Company Alimenta√É¬ß√É¬£o S.A. engages in the sale of food and beverages to restaurants, snack bars, and coffee shops in Brazil, Panama, Colombia, and the United States. It operates through Shopping Malls, Airports, Highways, United States of America, and Others segments. The company also supplies meals for airline companies; operates food courts in service stations, and restaurant chains located along highways; sells vehicle fuel; operates franchises; and subleases stores and spaces for promotional and commercial purposes in its store chain.
